use.flag: Drop bundled translations (~18M) for an English-only tree
Keep headers/pkgconfig/typelibs/man and the subproject CLIs in the bundle
Pull gnome-base/gvfs for trash://, recent://, network and MTP mounts
Pull media-video/ffmpegthumbnailer so video files get thumbnails
Pull gnome-extra/sushi for spacebar Quick Look previews
Pull app-misc/localsearch for full indexed search (otherwise live recursive search)
Enable the HEIF/HEIC media-libs/glycin-loaders image loader (preview + thumbnails)
Enable the JPEG XL media-libs/glycin-loaders image loader (preview + thumbnails)
Enable the SVG media-libs/glycin-loaders image loader (preview + thumbnails)
